description_long: This is a rectangular basketball court with a light wooden floor, marked with standard red and black basketball lines including the key, three-point arc, and center circle. The court surface shows some wear and discoloration, suggesting frequent use. At one end, there is a basketball hoop mounted on a rectangular backboard, which appears to be made of glass or transparent material, supported by a metal frame. The hoop is positioned above the court, with no visible net enclosure or fencing around the perimeter. The markings are clear and typical of a regulation half-court, with visible sidelines, baselines, and free throw areas. The overall design suggests an indoor gymnasium or a well-maintained urban recreational facility.
description: A worn wooden basketball court with red and black markings and a single glass backboard hoop at one end, typical of an indoor gym or urban rec center.
description_view_0: View from above and behind the hoop, showing the full court layout and the glass backboard with hoop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the court's length and the hoop's profile, with court markings visible along the floor.
description_view_2: Direct front view of the hoop and backboard, with the court extending behind and clear visibility of the key and three-point arc.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the court's length and the back of the hoop structure, with court markings and some floor wear visible.
